allow: PowerShell($hba = "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\data\\pg_hba.conf"; Write-Output "=== auth methods \(non-comment lines\) ==="; Select-String -Path $hba -Pattern "^\(host|local\)" | ForEach-Object { $_.Line })
PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD="postgres"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -c "SELECT version\(\);" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell($id = [System.Security.Principal.WindowsIdentity]::GetCurrent\(\); $p = New-Object System.Security.Principal.WindowsPrincipal\($id\); $isAdmin = $p.IsInRole\([System.Security.Principal.WindowsBuiltInRole]::Administrator\); Write-Output "Running as admin: $isAdmin"; Write-Output "User: $\($id.Name\)"; Write-Output "=== can we stop the service? \(dry test\) ==="; $svc = Get-Service postgresql-x64-18; Write-Output "Service status: $\($svc.Status\), CanStop: $\($svc.CanStop\)")

PowerShell($script = "C:\\Users\\sc1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-sc1-Documents-GitHub-KitchenaryKart\\3187bd26-b7cc-411d-b08f-9c93e0f862f5\\scratchpad\\pg-reset.ps1"; Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList "-NoProfile","-ExecutionPolicy","Bypass","-File","`"$script`"" -Wait; Write-Output "Elevated process finished. Log:"; if \(Test-Path 'C:\\Users\\sc1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pgreset.log'\) { Get-Content 'C:\\Users\\sc1\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\pgreset.log' } else { Write-Output "NO LOG - UAC may have been declined" })

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD="postgres"; $bin="C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin"; Write-Output "=== verify login ==="; & "$bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -c "SELECT version\(\);" | Select-Object -First 3; Write-Output "=== create database ==="; $exists = & "$bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -tAc "SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname='kitchenarykart';"; if \($exists -eq "1"\) { Write-Output "database kitchenarykart already exists" } else { & "$bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -h localhost -p 5432 -c "CREATE DATABASE kitchenarykart;"; Write-Output "created kitchenarykart" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Killing PID $_"; Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } } else { Write-Output "nothing listening on 3001" }; Start-Sleep 2; Write-Output "port 3001 now: $\(\(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count\) listeners")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "cleared old local dev-server process" } else { Write-Output "port 3001 already free" })
